message:
feat(web): simulation/structure polish + worker hardening

- simulations: add ResistanceVisualizer and route the resistance-cocktail simulation through the web SimulationView; keep sim stateRef updated immediately to avoid render stutter.
- structure loading: plumb a fromCache flag through LoadedStructure and expose it via useStructureQuery without a separate preflight cache check.
- workers: harden analysis worker window sizing (integer coercion) and add ResistanceCocktailState to the shared worker types.
- service worker: only CacheFirst *.wasm requests from the app origin.
- e2e: start capturing console errors before navigation to catch early-load failures.
- renderer-3d: close tail bottom rings for Lambda/T4/T7 wireframes.
- UI polish: improve histogram rendering for very thin bars, rank sparkline markers by prominence, switch base typography to sans-serif UI chrome, and memoize phage-id lookup in the mobile picker.

files.patch:
@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@ registerRoute(
 
 // Cache local WASM files with CacheFirst (immutable, versioned by build)
 registerRoute(
-  ({ url }) => url.pathname.endsWith('.wasm'),
+  ({ url }) => url.origin === self.location.origin && url.pathname.endsWith('.wasm'),
   new CacheFirst({
     cacheName: CACHE_NAMES.wasm,
     plugins: [
